sources.excerpt: Official homepage identifies Chadwicks at 203 Strand Street, Alexandria, VA 22314 and links its current menu PDFs and ordering.

Current restaurant-issued brunch, lunch, dinner, and dessert PDFs enumerate food and nonalcoholic menu items and ingredient descriptions; they include a raw/undercooked-food advisory but no allergen matrix.
Current weekly specials list Tacos del Dia, Ma’s Meatloaf, Pasta Night, and Fish & Chips.
Current happy-hour PDF lists six food offerings; most correspond to the main catalog, with Cheddarjack Nachos additionally represented.

Restaurant-linked Toast ordering identifies Chadwicks Old Town at 203 Strand Street, Alexandria and exposes the current lunch/dinner food catalog and item descriptions; no allergen matrix or cross-contact statement found.
Inspected official navigation, menu links, About, Contact, and private-event surfaces; no official allergen matrix or cross-contact policy found.

Inspected restaurant-issued menu PDFs, weekly specials, happy hour, downloadable-document and sitemap/CDN surfaces for allergen, allergy, nutrition, and ingredient material; no separate allergen matrix found.
Inspected same-location Toast categories and item pages for allergy, allergen, nutrition, ingredients, and cross-contact disclosures; no matrix or cross-contact policy found.
Targeted domain search surfaced official menu pages and PDFs but no official allergen matrix, nutrition guide, ingredient guide, or allergy policy.

currentProducts.name: Burger
currentProducts.description: Build your own; lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, potato kaiser, choice of side.

currentProducts.description: Romaine, pecorino romano, croutons, Caesar dressing.

currentProducts.name: Eggs Nova Scotia
currentProducts.description: Cold smoked salmon, English muffin, hollandaise.

currentProducts.name: Catfish Po’Boy
currentProducts.description: Fried blue catfish, lettuce, tomato, pickle, remoulade, sub roll.

currentProducts.name: Tacos del Dia
currentProducts.description: Three tacos served with rice and beans.

currentProducts.name: Ma’s Meatloaf
currentProducts.description: All-beef meatloaf with vegetables, mashed potatoes, and brown gravy.

currentProducts.name: Fish & Chips
currentProducts.description: Beer-battered cod with fries, slaw, and tartar sauce.

proposedChanges: Replace generic Restaurant/Sides categorization with current service-period categories; collapse equivalent duplicates; remove headings, modifiers, alcohol-only rows, and stale menu presentations; add current Toast and weekly-special products; retain official ingredient descriptions while marking official allergen status accurately unavailable.
